steps.t: Amâsu has asked you to attempt to enter the other mine tunnels in the hills north of Iridír. She believes one of them may be the location of the lost …

You have found a mine tunnel with a rusted gate that you were able to open. Inside, dangerous scorpions are present. You should defeat them.
You have found a mine tunnel with a rusted gate that you were able to open. While exploring the tunnels, you found a wall that struck you as odd.
While exploring another salt mine tunnel, you noticed an unusual wall. You should tell Amâsu.
